algorithms.algorithm: 5-phase pipeline: fetch all sources → batch dedup → Claude analysis (concurrency 5) → batch insert → auto-routing
Signature verification (HMAC SHA-256) → event dispatch → subscriptions upsert/update → K2C donation trigger on invoice.paid → notifications on trial_will_end and payment_failed
14-day drip: Welcome(day0) + Series1 How-to-Use(operational roles) + Series2 Lead-with-Confidence(leadership) + Referral(day5,10) + Warnings(day7,13,14). Owner gets both on alternating days.

7 scoring types (weighted_deduction,heavy_weighted,major_violation_count,negative_scale,major_minor_reinspect,violation_point_accumulation,report_only), 8 grading types (letter_grade,letter_grade_strict,color_placard,score_100,score_negative,pass_reinspect,three_tier_rating,report_only). CalCode §113985 imminent hazard check. Per-jurisdiction weights from verified source data. No defaults.
Daily readiness score: start at 100, deduct for openCA(-5 each, max -30), overdue temps(-3 each, max -20), expired docs(-5 each, max -25). Upserts to readiness_snapshots.

Maps sensor alerts to emergency playbook templates: temperature_critical, equipment_failure, power_loss, water_leak, fire_alarm, contamination, pest_detected, humidity_critical. Creates 'suggested' playbook activation and notifies location managers.
Per-org donation: $10/location, 100 meals/location. Dedup by (org_id, donation_period). Triggered by stripe invoice.paid or API.
Auto-routing: hold(enforcement/outbreak/critical risk, 12-24h deadline) → notify(elevated risk maxRisk>=50, 48h deadline) → auto(low risk in autonomous mode). Supervised mode defaults notify.

workflows.chain: jurisdictions UPDATE → trg_jurisdiction_config_drift → fn_jurisdiction_config_drift_check() → net.http_post → jurisdiction-drift-alert edge fn → Resend email to arthur@getevidly.com → support_tickets INSERT
organizations INSERT/UPDATE → trg_set_trial_end_date → set_trial_end_date() → sets trial_end_date = trial_start_date + 14 days
support_tickets INSERT → ticket_sla → set_ticket_sla() → auto-assigns SLA deadline based on priority
temperature_logs INSERT → trg_temp_deviation_to_ca → fn_temp_deviation_to_ca() → auto-creates corrective_action if temp_pass=false
invoice.paid webhook → stripe-webhook → fetch subscriptions.user_id → user_profiles.organization_id → k2c-processor edge fn → k2c_donations INSERT + admin_event_log
pg_cron 7am PT → trial-email-sender → organizations(trial) → user_profiles → role-based email selection → Resend API → trial_email_log dedup
sensor alert → playbook-auto-trigger → match ALERT_TO_PLAYBOOK → playbook_templates lookup → playbook_activations INSERT (suggested) → notifications INSERT for managers
